news.headline: Philip Morris International declares $1.35 dividend per share, payable on Jan 13, 2025 to shareholders by Dec 26, 2024.
news.summary: The Board of Directors of Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE: PM) has announced a regular quarterly dividend of $1.35 per common share. Shareholders of record as of December 26, 2024, will receive the payment on January 13, 2025. The ex-dividend date is also December 26, 2024. For further information on stock, dividends, and other details, visit www.pmi.com/dividend. Philip Morris International is committed to delivering a Smoke-Free Future.

news.headline: Partners Warehouse, supported by Red Arts Capital, acquires PSS Distribution Services, expanding operations to East Coast.
news.summary: Partners Warehouse, a company under Red Arts Capital, has recently acquired PSS Distribution Services, a top third-party logistics provider on the East Coast of the US. This acquisition aims to enhance Partners Warehouse's presence in key 3PL service areas across the nation. PSS is renowned for its expertise in warehousing, distribution, and value-added services. This move signifies a strategic step towards expanding Partners Warehouse's operational reach and solidifying its position in the industry.

news.headline: Vizient and Kaufman Hall release 2025 trends report for healthcare leaders, providing strategy roadmap.
news.summary: A report on 2025 trends was released today by a company in Irving, Texas, with input from industry experts at Vizient and its subsidiary Kaufman Hall. This report provides valuable insights for the upcoming years.

news.headline: 79% of financial services firms see AI as crucial for success, according to Smarsh report.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, Smarsh, a key player in communications data and intelligence, released findings from its recent 2025 Communications Compliance Survey. The report sheds light on the priorities of financial services companies as they navigate the landscape of artificial intelligence (AI) along with regulatory compliance and risk management concerns in the upcoming year. Surveyed in October 2024, the research highlighted that 79% of firms consider AI essential for the sector's future.

news.headline: Zoho introduces Zoho Payroll in the US, streamlining payroll processing and compliance for businesses. Includes advancements to Zoho's finance solutions.
news.summary: Zoho Corporation, a renowned global technology company based in Austin, Texas, has introduced the US edition of Zoho Payroll. This comprehensive solution aims to simplify payroll management, guarantee compliance, automate tax payments and filing, and remove operational barriers among departments managing staff data, financial information, and payment procedures. The launch of Zoho Payroll coincides with enhancements to Zoho's current range of finance tools, including Zoho Books, Zoho Inventory, and Zoho Practice.

news.headline: athenahealth unveils AI solutions cutting RCM work by 50% for thousands of practices, aiming to streamline processes.
news.summary: A healthcare technology company based in Boston, athenahealth, has revealed their latest automation and AI-driven software advancements aimed at streamlining revenue cycle management (RCM) for numerous practices. The new innovations are designed to simplify processes and alleviate the workload for thousands of healthcare facilities.

news.headline: ATS announces normal course issuer bid on TSX and NYSE, with plans to purchase up to 8,259,180 common shares (approx. 10% of total 97,926,826 shares) for cancellation.
news.summary: ATS Corporation (TSX and NYSE: ATS) based in Cambridge, Ontario, has disclosed its plan to initiate a normal course issuer bid (NCIB) as acknowledged by the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). As of December 2, 2024, the company had 97,926,826 common shares currently in circulation. The NCIB allows ATS to buy back and cancel a maximum of 8,259,180 common shares, which accounts for roughly 10% of the company's total public shares.

news.headline: China: China is about to hit 2024 economic growth target.

Global Crosslinking Agents Market to grow at 4.1% CAGR, reaching $20,283.1 million by 2034. Demand from automotive, construction, packaging, and healthcare sectors drives growth, especially in paints and coatings industry. North America to see 4.3% CAGR, with $2,518.0 million absolute $ opportunity. Trend towards sustainable products boosting biocompatible crosslink agents production.
news.summary: The Global Crosslinking Agents Market is expected to reach US$20,283.1 million by 2034, with a current value of US$13,571.5 million as of 2024, growing at a CAGR of 4.1% over the decade. The demand for crosslinking agents is increasing in sectors like automotive, construction, packaging, and healthcare, primarily due to their ability to enhance material properties. In polymer technology, these agents improve polymer properties by forming covalent bonds between chains, particularly significant in the paints and coatings industry. Market growth is driven by technological advancements, leading to sustainable products and a rise in biocompatible crosslink agents production. North America is expected to expand at a CAGR of 4.3% from 2024 to 2034, with an absolute opportunity of US$2,518.0 million. This growth signifies the increasing importance of crosslinking agents in various industries for improving material properties and longevity.

news.headline: Cynthia Cohn, a 20-year real estate leader, joins Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties in Pasadena.
news.summary: In Pasadena, California, Cynthia Cohn has transitioned her established real estate business of two decades to Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties. Branch Manager, Marilyn Simon, noted Cynthia's strong brand built during her brokerage tenure. With over 20 years of experience, Cynthia is a renowned agent in Pasadena. Marilyn expressed pride in Cynthia's decision to align with their agency, viewing it as a testament to Cynthia's reputation. The collaboration signifies a significant move in the real estate market locally.

news.headline: Nvidia: Rumours about Nvidia halting supply to China are false. $NVDA
Sephora celebrates 10 years of Accelerate program with 8 BIPOC brands in new cohort, spanning haircare, makeup, skincare, fragrance categories.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Sephora North America announced the selection of eight BIPOC brands for its 2025 Accelerate program. This initiative, aimed at fostering and advancing emerging beauty brands, has supported BIPOC-founded and -owned businesses for ten years. The chosen cohort for this year includes brands in haircare, makeup, skincare, and fragrance sectors. With a focus on empowering diverse talent, the Sephora Accelerate program continues to serve as a crucial platform for innovation in the beauty industry.

news.headline: Global Net Lease closes $620M in dispositions as part of strategic plan.
news.summary: Global Net Lease has disclosed the successful closing of $620 million worth of dispositions as a key component of their strategic plan to optimize assets.

news.headline: CLEAR, an Official TSA PreCheck Enrollment Provider, opens new enrollment location at Mall of America. Offers convenient option for consumers to enroll or renew in TSA PreCheck.
news.summary: A new enrollment site has been established for consumers looking to enroll or renew in TSA PreCheck, providing a convenient option. This location offers services for individuals seeking to apply for or renew their TSA PreCheck membership. The site aims to cater to the needs of travelers by providing a streamlined process for enrollment or renewal in the TSA PreCheck program. Interested individuals can visit this new enrollment location to complete the necessary procedures and benefit from expedited security screenings at airports, with enrollment and membership renewal services readily available. This initiative ensures smoother travel experiences for members, demonstrating the commitment to enhancing air travel convenience. Travelers can take advantage of this new enrollment site to join or extend their participation in the TSA PreCheck program easily. The location serves as a strategic option for individuals interested in quick and efficient enrollment or renewal processes, making it a convenient choice for those looking to access TSA PreCheck benefits. By utilizing this enrollment facility, consumers can efficiently enroll or renew their TSA PreCheck membership, promoting seamless travel experiences with expedited security procedures. Make the process more efficient by visiting the site today to enroll or renew in TSA PreCheck.

news.headline: Keros Therapeutics pauses dosing in Phase 2 TROPOS trial for PAH drug; halting 3.0 mg/kg and 4.5 mg/kg arms due to safety concerns.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Keros Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: KROS), a biopharmaceutical company, announced the voluntary suspension of dosing in the 3.0 mg/kg and 4.5 mg/kg treatment arms of the TROPOS trial. This Phase 2 trial involves cibotercept (KER-012) combined with background therapy for patients with pulmonary arterial hypertension. The decision was made after a safety review revealed unexpected pericardial effusion adverse events. Keros focuses on developing therapies for patients with disorders related to dysfunctional signaling of the TGF-ß protein family.

news.headline: Company from Texas has signed non-binding letter to explore forming joint venture for mining in New Mexico and Arizona's Greenlea County.
news.summary: A recent report stated that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, a significant increase from the previous estimate of 4.1%. This growth is primarily driven by the strong performance of major economies, with the United States leading the way with a predicted growth rate of 7.2%. Other key economies such as China and India are also expected to experience robust growth rates of 8.5% and 9.6% respectively. However, the report warned that the recovery remains uneven, with emerging markets and developing economies facing greater challenges due to the ongoing pandemic. It emphasized the need for continued support and cooperation to ensure a more inclusive and sustainable recovery for all countries.

news.headline: Cenovus Energy plans $4.6-5.0B capital investment, aiming for 805,000-845,000 BOE/d production by 2025, with $3.2B sustaining base production and $1.4-1.8B growth projects. Maintains net debt near $4.0B.
news.summary: Calgary-based Cenovus Energy Inc. revealed its 2025 corporate guidance, with a capital investment range of $4.6 billion to $5.0 billion. The plan aims to achieve upstream production levels between 805,000 to 845,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day and downstream crude unit utilization set at 90% to 95%. Of the total investment, approximately $3.2 billion is allocated for sustaining capital to uphold base production and ensure safe operations, with an additional $1.4 billion to $1.8 billion designated for advancing upstream growth projects. The company's strategy focuses on disciplined capital management and cost control to facilitate the return of 100% of excess free funds flow (EFFF) to shareholders overtime, while also maintaining net debt around $4.0 billion.

news.headline: Euronet to acquire ATM assets in Estonia, Lithuania, Latvia from Swedbank for outsourcing; covering in-branch and off-branch ATMs.
news.summary: Euronet has reached a deal to purchase the bank’s ATM assets in both branch and off-branch locations across the three Baltic countries.

news.headline: Exodus Inc. increases Bitcoin holdings to over 1,900, provides swap volume update amidst BTC crossing $100,000 threshold.
news.summary: Omaha, Nebraska – Exodus Movement, Inc. (OTCQX: EXOD), a prominent self-custodial cryptocurrency software platform, has provided an update on its digital assets, cash holdings, and exchange provider processed volume. The company decided to issue this statement in response to recent market developments in the digital asset industry, notably Bitcoin reaching a record-breaking milestone by surpassing $100,000 for the first time. It is essential to highlight that the following preliminary metrics have not undergone auditing or review by Deloitte & Touche LLP, the company's independent registered public accounting firm. These metrics do not reflect the company's financial status at quarter or fiscal year-end, and remain subject to finalization pending completion of fiscal year-end processes and financial reporting. The information disclosed is based on data available to management as of the date of this announcement and is not a comprehensive representation of the company's financial position for the quarter or fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024.

Alipay app in China features ad allowing users to invest up to $137 daily in fund linked to US Bitcoin ETF and Coinbase.
news.summary: Mainland Chinese users of Alipay recently came across an advertisement encouraging them to invest a maximum of $137 per day in a fund. This fund provides indirect exposure to a US spot Bitcoin ETF and Coinbase, a popular cryptocurrency platform.

news.headline: Blackstone buys Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho for $2.6 billion, Japan’s largest foreign real estate investment.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Blackstone, a prominent alternative investment firm, disclosed its acquisition of Tokyo Garden Terrace Kioicho, a renowned mixed-use asset spanning 2.4 million square feet. The deal, valued at $2.6 billion or about JPY 400 billion, represents the largest real estate investment by a foreign entity in Japan. This acquisition stands as the biggest investment by Blackstone to date.

news.headline: Banks borrow £43.4bn in Bank of England repo operation
Royal Ahrend selected IFS to support growth & sustainability. IFS Cloud to aid in gaining insights & meeting ESG targets.
news.summary: An international workspace provider will benefit from real-time insights, enhanced business initiatives, and ESG goal achievement through IFS Cloud. London, Dec. 12, 2024 - IFS, a prominent enterprise cloud and Industrial AI software company, revealed today that its cloud solution will assist Royal... in achieving these objectives.

news.headline: Ryvu Therapeutics updates on RVU120 Phase II program in oncology, WSE: RVU, Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: In Krakow, Poland on December 12, 2024, Ryvu Therapeutics (traded as WSE: RVU) shared an update on their clinical advancements. They are a company dedicated to developing innovative therapies for cancer treatment. The update specifically discussed the Phase II program RVU120, showcasing important data and progress made in this program.

World's first AI-driven VC fund Arok raises $800k and surpasses $1.3m AUM through independent management.
news.summary: Arok VC stands out as the pioneering venture capital fund globally operated by an artificial intelligence entity, handling asset transactions autonomously without human involvement. Since its inception in late October 2024, Arok has amassed $800,000 by utilizing self-promotion strategies on social media platforms independently.

news.headline: Hacker exploits Dogecoin flaw, crashing 69% of nodes and potentially threatening network stability.
news.summary: According to security experts, a potential flaw had the capability of disrupting the entire Dogecoin network.

H2O Innovation unveils Mega-Vessel with partners, MegaVessels Water Inc. and Harbin ROPV Industrial Co., Ltd., for desalination market.
news.summary: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates -- H2O Innovation Inc. revealed the Mega-Vessel Membrane System for Reverse Osmosis (RO) applications in partnership with MegaVessels Water Inc. and Harbin ROPV Industrial Co., Ltd. This innovative system was introduced to the desalination market during the World Congress of the Int. The collaboration between the partners aims to bring cutting-edge technology to this sector. No specific numbers were mentioned in the provided text.

Eureka Robotics raises $10.5M Series A to expand Physical AI products for precision manufacturing & logistics. Expanding operations in Singapore, Japan, and US market.
news.summary: Eureka Robotics, a Singaporean start-up, has announced significant progress in the development and launch of their key products, the Eureka Controller and Eureka 3D Camera. This advancement has expanded their operations in Singapore and Japan, positioning them for a successful entry into the lucrative US market. The company is striving to maximize its potential and reach a wider customer base with these flagship products.

news.headline: Drew Nelson OBE joins Finchetto to boost energy-efficient AI with optical passive network switch. Awards: 'Hottest European Pre-seed Company' and winner of Deeptech Demo Day 2024.
news.summary: A London-based company, Finchetto, pioneering the development of the world’s initial fully-optical passive network switch for energy-efficient artificial intelligence, has appointed Drew Nelson OBE as a Non-Executive Director. Drew, a recipient of multiple accolades, recently joined the Board. In November, Finchetto was honored with the title of ‘Hottest European Pre-seed Company’ at The Europas Awards and triumphed over 250 start-ups to emerge as the champion of Deeptech Demo Day 2024. Dr. Drew Nelson FREng, FInstP, DSc OBE brings significant expertise to the company.

news.headline: Fujitsu launches AI agent for frontline workplaces with top accuracy & extended video processing capability.
news.summary: A groundbreaking technology has been unveiled in Kawasaki, Japan on December 12, 2024. Fujitsu has introduced a video analytics AI agent designed for frontline workplaces, boasting world-leading accuracy and significantly extended video duration processing capabilities. This cutting-edge AI agent utilizes spatial video analysis to enhance performance, marking a significant advancement in the field.

news.headline: Infosys partners with RheinEnergie to aid enterprises in achieving up to 30-40% energy efficiency boost.
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India, on December 12, 2024, Infosys (NSE: INFY), (BSE: INFY), (NYSE: INFY) announced a partnership aimed at enhancing energy efficiency for enterprises. By utilizing Infosys Cobalt and Infosys Topaz, the collaboration strives to help businesses achieve a significant increase in energy efficiency ranging between 30% to 40%. This initiative is designed to assist companies in meeting their decarbonization objectives, addressing environmental concerns, and promoting sustainable practices.

news.summary: In 2021, Asahi Net became the pioneer in implementing the SG-Tera II, making it the first CSP to do so.

news.headline: New rule caps overdraft fees at big banks - could save Americans billions yearly; future uncertain under Trump admin.
news.summary: It is uncertain if the regulation, potentially saving Americans billions of dollars in fees annually, will persist once President-elect Donald J. Trump resumes office.
